## Data Availability

### API / Data Feed Information

**Feed Type:**
- [ ] GTFS Static
- [ ] GTFS-RT (Realtime)
- [ ] Custom REST API
- [ ] Other:

**Documentation URL:** [Link to API docs]

**Data Portal URL:** [Link to data portal]

**API Key Required:** Yes / No

**Rate Limits:** [If known]

### Data Coverage

- [ ] Real-time vehicle positions
- [ ] Trip updates / predictions
- [ ] Service alerts
- [ ] Static schedule data
- [ ] Historical data available
